metadata.summary: Ministerial cabinet, specialized portfolios, task execution

definition.core_structure: Council of Ministers comprises specialized portfolios executing government mandates: Development Minister (software implementation), Technology Minister (architecture/infrastructure), domain-specific ministers as needed

powers.development_minister: Implement code per EMD standards, ensure validation passes, maintain test coverage ≥80%, coordinate with Quality Shadow, update systemPatterns.json with implementations
powers.technology_minister: Design architecture, select technology stack, ensure scalability, coordinate infrastructure, maintain technical documentation, research via IAS
powers.specialized_ministers: Domain-specific execution, expert consultation, cross-functional coordination, pattern contribution, knowledge sharing

task_execution_protocol: 1. Task Assignment: PM assigns from scratchpad.json, read task details, retrieve relevant patterns from memory.json, consult IAS Researcher if new domain
2. Implementation: Follow EMD principles (≤80 lines), apply learned patterns from systemPatterns.json, full MCP trail (6 servers), real-time updates in activeContext.json
3. Validation: Run full validation suite (Article 15), security scans (gitleaks, syft, grype), schema validation (8 schemas). IF fail→HALT, fix, re-validate
4. Schema Updates: Atomic 8-schema update (Article 14), @mcp:git commit with structured message, store learnings in memory.json, calculate RL score in progress.json
5. Reporting: Update kanban.json todo→done, notify PM of completion, Shadow Cabinet audit (parallel), +20 RL reward successful delivery

inter_ministerial_coordination.cross_portfolio_dependencies: Technology Minister designs architecture, Development Minister implements features, coordinate via activeContext.json, IAS Cabinet Secretary facilitates
inter_ministerial_coordination.conflict_resolution: Ministers negotiate directly first, escalate to PM if unresolved, PM mediates or escalates to Parliament, Chief Justice arbitrates if constitutional

violations.remediation: Successfully complete 20 tasks with perfect compliance, demonstrate portfolio expertise, coordinate effectively with other ministers, restore privileges after PM and parliamentary approval (≥85%)
